name: Asparagus and Beef with Black Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Asparagus, cut into 1/2-in thick diagonal pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the black beans with warm water for 5 minutes. Drain thoroughly.
2. Put the garlic and ginger into a bowl with the mashed black beans; set aside.
3. Slice the beef against the grain into 1/4-inch thick slices. Toss with the beef marinade. Set aside for 10 minutes.
4. Preheat a wok until hot. Add 2 tablespoons of oil. Over high heat, add beef and stir-fry for a minute or until seared. Remove and set aside.
5. While the wok is hot, add remaining oil, salt, and reserved black-bean paste. Stir-fry until fragrant, about a few seconds.
6. Toss in the onions and stir-fry for 10 seconds. Then add the asparagus in 2 or 3 batches, making certain the wok is hot before adding the next batch. Stir until asparagus are coated with the oil.
7. Sprinkle with soy sauce, toss together, then pour in the stock. Bring to a boil. If the asparagus needs more cooking, cover for about a minute.
8. Meanwhile, stir the cornstarch, water, sugar, and oyster sauce into a smooth paste. When the asparagus is tender but still crisp, add the cornstarch mixture into the center of the wok. Stir until thickened, about 10 seconds.
9. Return the beef to the wok, add a dash of sesame oil; toss to mix. Serve hot over rice.
